title: Where does Liliths Cross come from
display_title: Where does Liliths Cross come from
wikitext:
[]: Where does Lilith's Cross come from?             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Jun 09, 2009 7:52 pm So part of my angel design contest angel has gotten me to thinking about the cross that lilith is nailed to. judging from this picture, it seems like Nerv is the one to nail her down as at this point her right arm is being shortened as her matter is used to create 01. Probably after her arm regrew they put the nail in. However, why nail her down at all? Was she dangerous somehow? why limit her growth? And why would they nail her down to a 100ft high red slab anyway? Once the lance was removed she still did not try to escape as she was soulless so did the nails do anything?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 09, 2009 7:53 pm I'm guessing Lilith's soul was still inside her long before Rei showed up, so maybe Geherin/Seele didn't want to take any chances?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Jun 09, 2009 7:59 pm Forgot to mention the FAR. It either came from Nerv or them, but neither side seems to have a good reason for putting her on a big red slab

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Jun 09, 2009 9:09 pm It came from Anno's want for religious references that he knew nothing about.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Tue Jun 09, 2009 9:17 pm Is Lilith even on a cross in that picture? I thought that she was in a cross-shaped trough in the floor, the same trough that we see in the Eva graveyard in the director's cut. The cross is probably used for Lilith for the same reason that it was used for people: it's a convenient structure to hang people on. That, and Seele probably demanded it because they're a bunch of really screwed up old freaks.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaque » Tue Jun 09, 2009 9:38 pm Baz wrote: Is Lilith even on a cross in that picture? I thought that she was in a cross-shaped trough in the floor, the same trough that we see in the Eva graveyard in the director's cut.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Jun 09, 2009 10:20 pm Baz wrote: Is Lilith even on a cross in that picture? I thought that she was in a cross-shaped trough in the floor, the same trough that we see in the Eva graveyard in the director's cut.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jun 09, 2009 10:34 pm It's probably man-made, or at least man modified. In episode 15, we see this behind Lilith's head: In episode 15 groundwork, we see that they're labeled:

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Jun 09, 2009 11:37 pm I never knew that ^ What do you think those mean, maybe the amount of LCL that comes from her? Side note..What do you think is behind the mask itself. I know topics have been made.

[]:             Quote Post by DummyPlug » Wed Jun 10, 2009 2:39 am Do the labels say LCL1 LCL2, etc? Would that mean they are pumping LCL out of her head?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Jun 10, 2009 4:48 am Cool pics! The amount of detail that can be passed up in this series! There seems to be a "main drain" or something connected to her head that is labeled with longer writing. I wonder what that could be.. So, are they extracting LCL directly from her head? But she churns out an amount that would fill a small lake down below. Maybe there is a difference in quality between the tang extracted from her body through those drains and that which just leaks from her? Or after her soul was taken from her body, did they need to actually pump LCL through her to maintain her form? But where would the LCL come from? Is this some recirculatory system? Questions that just can not be answered.... As for the cross itself: handy way to keep ancient progenitors in the basement, and looks cool. You just can't run a mysterious organization without having a crucifix somewhere. 


[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Jun 10, 2009 2:23 pm @OP: She's probably nailed down for convenience; it's not like she's a danger to them or that the nails would stop her anyway. Or after her soul was taken from her body, did they need to actually pump LCL through her to maintain her form? But where would the LCL come from? Is this some recirculatory system?

[]:             Quote Post by GVman » Wed Jun 10, 2009 9:53 pm Action_Bastard wrote: It came from Anno's want for religious references that he knew nothing about.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Jun 11, 2009 12:31 am Now I'm trying to imagine what the seeds were supposed to do in their daily lives if they weren't supposed to be nailed down to something. Power spawning babies? Just standing around? Darn it to hell, all this thinking made my angel design idea illogical. Honestly, did they just stand inside their moons till they landed, they didnt even have chairs :(

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Thu Jun 11, 2009 12:38 am Their metaphysical existence is on an entirely different plane than ours. In other words, I don't think that we have much hope of figuring out how they get their kicks.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jun 11, 2009 1:34 am http://i43.tinypic.com/fmmal0.jpg Something like this I can only assume..Hours spent on this btw. I always liked the placement of the Core even if its not there later on. Edit...its almost 5 am and I can not sleep cause its so freaking hot so I got out of bed and made this.. Things I think she might do on the way here or something. http://i39.tinypic.com/2vinksy.jpg I have more ideas but my mind won't let me think of them if that makes sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Thu Jun 11, 2009 1:45 am So the spear holds an unrequited love for the SOL, huh? And I love the way that Lilith is giving her spear the hairy eyeball. When Reichu is back she's gonna give you hell about the core placement, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Jun 11, 2009 2:03 am well that solves the mystery of why the lance is gone, she breaks it herself for being too needy i love how earth is all confused

[]:             Quote Post by Consul_Elect » Thu Jun 11, 2009 10:12 am @Axell -- Where did that picture come from? I've never seen it before.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jun 11, 2009 11:06 am It's one of Reichu's compositing jobs (scroll down) from the TrueType OP.
